seasons.label: Cool Season
seasons.recommendation: High visibility for diving and mountain trekking.

seasons.label: Summer Season
seasons.recommendation: Perfect for water festivals and island hopping.

seasons.label: Rainy Season
seasons.recommendation: Ideal for waterfalls and lush green landscapes.

seasons.label: Peak Festival
seasons.recommendation: Busy period with major cultural celebrations.

places.name: Grand Palace
places.introduction: Historic royal residence and temple complex in the heart of Bangkok.

places.name: Wat Arun
places.introduction: Iconic riverside temple known for its towering spires.

places.name: Mandarin Oriental
places.introduction: Luxury historic hotel offering unparalleled riverside views.

places.name: Jim Thompson House
places.introduction: Museum containing the art collection of the American silk entrepreneur.

places.name: The Siam Hotel
places.introduction: Urban luxury resort showcasing Art Deco design.

places.name: Asiatique The Riverfront
places.introduction: Large open-air night market and entertainment complex.

places.name: Capella Bangkok
places.introduction: Boutique ultra-luxury hotel situated on the Chao Phraya River.

places.name: Mahanakhon SkyWalk
places.introduction: Thailand's highest observation deck with a glass tray floor.

places.name: Chatrium Riverside
places.introduction: Modern hotel featuring spacious suites with river views.

places.name: Erawan Shrine
places.introduction: Famous Hindu shrine that attracts thousands of daily worshippers.

places.name: White Temple
places.introduction: Contemporary, unconventional art exhibit in the style of a Buddhist temple.

places.name: Le Meridien Chiang Rai
places.introduction: Luxury resort located along the serene Kok River.

places.name: Doi Inthanon
places.introduction: The highest peak in Thailand, featuring trails and royal pagodas.

places.name: Four Seasons Resort
places.introduction: Opulent villas surrounded by working rice paddies.

places.name: Bo Kluea Rock Salt
places.introduction: Ancient rock salt extraction village deep in the mountains.

places.name: Sapan Retreat
places.introduction: Rustic and calm homestay surrounded by foggy valleys.

places.name: Death Railway
places.introduction: Historic WWII railway cutting through rugged mountain passes.

places.name: The FloatHouse
places.introduction: Boutique floating villas on the River Kwai.

places.name: Sukhothai Historical Park
places.introduction: UNESCO ruins of the first capital of Siam.

places.name: Sriwilai Sukhothai
places.introduction: Elegant resort offering vistas of the nearby historical ruins.

places.name: Sanctuary of Truth
places.introduction: Massive wooden structure filled with intricate Hindu and Buddhist carvings.

places.name: Cape Dara Resort
places.introduction: 5-star beachfront resort in North Pattaya.

places.name: Maya Bay
places.introduction: Stunning cove sheltered by 100-meter high cliffs.

places.name: Rayavadee
places.introduction: Luxury jungle resort accessed only by boat at Railay Beach.

places.name: Khao Yai National Park
places.introduction: Vast nature reserve known for wild elephants and cascading waterfalls.

places.name: Muthi Maya Forest Pool Villa
places.introduction: Exclusive pool villas blending seamlessly with the forest backdrop.

places.name: Promthep Cape
places.introduction: The most famous and photographed sunset viewpoint in Phuket.

places.name: Sri Panwa
places.introduction: Luxury pool villa resort perched high atop Cape Panwa.

places.name: Khao Sok National Park
places.introduction: Ancient rainforest featuring towering limestone karst formations.

places.name: 500 Rai Floating Resort
places.introduction: Remote overwater bungalows on Cheow Lan Lake.
